The '''Snic 2-4-2''', also known as a '''Strong Arm Droid''', was a fifth-degree [[Labor droid/Legends|labor]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

The 2-4-2 droid was equipped with a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] drive and two large, primary grasping arms that allowed it to carry cargo. It had two smaller manipulator arms on either side of its body, for fine work.

Around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] some of these droids were owned and operated by [[Tig Fromm]] and the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]]. They worked inside [[Tig Fromm's base]].<ref name="WW">{{DroidsCite|The White Witch}}</ref> The droids were also present in the Fromm Gang prison.<ref name="VG">[[Star Wars: Droids (video game)|''Star Wars: Droids'' video game]]</ref>
